[cron:ffd77541-44ce-46e3-82f4-2c43a3a2f144 09:00量化回测队列检查提醒-v2] 执行以下任务：
1. 进入 /Users/ling/.openclaw/workspace/quant_projects/personal-a-share-research-system
2. 运行 python3 scripts/report_backtest_queue_status.py
3. 直接输出脚本结果，不要引用旧会话缓存，不要补充过期回测结论
4. 如果脚本失败，只返回错误摘要与失败命令

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
